heading: GOVERNING LAW
operative_text: Except to the extent modified by the terms of the agreement, the consolidated district is governed by the applicable provisions of Subchapter D, Chapter 13, other than a provision requiring consolidating districts to be contiguous. The agreement may not be inconsistent with the requirements of this subchapter.
_note: No defined terms present in this section. Cross references include Subchapter D, Chapter 13 (governing law source) and Subchapter B, Chapter 41 (transfer origin per legislative history).
